name: DeadRift: Zombie Survival VR
summary: DeadRift: Zombie Survival VR — the ultimate zombie VR game on Meta Quest. A mysterious rift has shattered the world, unleashing a deadly infection that turned humanity into the undead. As one of the last survivors, fight through dangerous locations, scavenge weapons, and battle relentless zombie hordes in a fully immersive VR experience. Every bullet matters. Every decision counts. The zombie apocalypse is here — will you survive the rift?
